ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tank_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tank class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the tank class (e.g., Heavy Tank, Medium Tank, Light Tank) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tank class */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon for the tank class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., regular, premium, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the game */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tanks" (
  "player_tank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-tank relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tank */,
  "battles_played" INTEGER /* Number of battles played by the player with the tank */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills made by the player with the tank */,
  "win_rate" TEXT /* Win rate of the player with the tank */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the player with the tank */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the player with the tank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_tank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tanks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the battle occurred */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the map where the battle took place */,
  "battle_type" TEXT /* Type of battle (e.g., ranked, casual) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the battle in minutes */,
  "total_players" INTEGER /* Total number of players in the battle */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode of the battle (e.g., team deathmatch, capture the flag) */,
  "battle_result" TEXT /* Result of the battle (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the map */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the map (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "terrain_type" TEXT /* Type of terrain on the map (e.g., desert, forest, urban) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the map image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle participant */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "player_team" TEXT /* Team the player was on (e.g., red, blue) */,
  "player_tank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player-tank relationship */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills made by the player in the battle */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths of the player in the battle */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player won the battle */,
  "experience_earned" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the player in the battle */,
  "rewards" TEXT /* Rewards earned by the player in the battle (e.g., gold, items) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_participants_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_participants_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_participants_player_tank_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_tank_id") REFERENCES player_tanks ("player_tank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Summary of changes in the version */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Detailed patch notes for the version */,
  "update_size" INTEGER /* Size of the update in megabytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_tanks" (
  "version_tank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version-tank relationship */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game version */,
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tank */,
  "introduced" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tank was introduced in this version */,
  "balance_changes" TEXT /* Description of balance changes made to the tank in this version */,
  "stats_changes" TEXT /* Description of stat changes made to the tank in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_tank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_tanks_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES game_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., regular, premium, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  "rewards" TEXT /* Rewards associated with the role (e.g., exclusive items, bonus experience) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., item, gold, experience) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rewards" (
  "player_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-reward relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward */,
  "claimed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the reward has been claimed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., wins, losses, kills) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
